news.t: Themes ETFs Launch with Expense Ratios 40% Below the Category Average

holdings.infoBox: SMCF is an equity ETF with a total of 76 individual holdings. The top holdings are East West Bancorp stock at 5.61%, Nextpower at 4.82%, Mueller Industries at 4.51%, Reinsurance Group of America at 4.32%, and RenaissanceRe Holdings at 4.08%.

overview.description: The Themes US Small Cap Cash Flow Champions ETF (SMCF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of 75 US small-cap companies identified to have high cash flow yield. SMCF was launched on Dec 13, 2023 and is issued by Themes.
infoTable: Solactive US Small Cap Cash Flow Champions Index

data.title: Themes ETFs Launch with Expense Ratios 40% Below the Category Average
data.text: Priced at 0.35%, over 40% below the average expense ratio charged by other thematic funds, Themes ETFs seeks to provide investors with targeted thematic exposure at low costs.1 NEW YORK , Dec. 8, 2023...
